## Boundary checklist

- [ ] No user-data collection added.
- [ ] No public wallet connection added.
- [ ] No token approval, network switching, transaction broadcasting, or funds movement added.
- [ ] No analytics, cookies, forms, localStorage, or sessionStorage added.
- [ ] No unsupported claims added.
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant.
- [ ] Tests updated where relevant.
- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] Public/private proof boundary preserved.
- [ ] AGIALPHA boundary preserved.
- [ ] No menu stacking introduced.
- [ ] Route catalog updated if routes changed.
